description: Six UI tweaks to the Shogun's Ascent board game app: clan tooltip icons, card translations, tooltip arrow, rule violation toast position, diorama shadow, and coin icon in season card picker.
steps: CHANGE 1 - In src/components/MainMenu.tsx: Import HonorIcon and CoinIcon from './Icons'. In the clan tooltip section (around line 217-218), add before the honor number text and before the income number text. The current lines are: `Honor inicial: {c.initialHonor}` and `Ingresos: {CLAN_INCOME[c.id] ?? 0}`. Wrap the icon+text in an inline-flex span with alignItems center and a small gap.
CHANGE 2 - In src/types/game.ts: Translate ALL `effect` field values in the SPRING_CARDS, SUMMER_CARDS, and AUTUMN_CARDS arrays from English to Spanish.
CHANGE 3 - In src/App.css: Find the rule `.politics-phase-tooltip-tea::after{left:25%}` and change it to `.politics-phase-tooltip-tea::after{left:calc(25% - 6px)}`.

CHANGE 4 - In src/App.css: Change the `.rule-violation-toast` style from `position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%)` to position it centered in the map viewport area. Since the map is the center panel, change to: `position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)`. Then in src/components/GameBoard.tsx, move the rule-violation-toast div to be INSIDE the map-container div (so that position:absolute is relative to map-container which already has position:relative).

CHANGE 5 - In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx: All the DioramaFigure wrapper divs that contain a ClanShield have `filter: 'drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.6))'`. Make the shadow more visible by changing to `filter: 'drop-shadow(0 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.9)) drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.7))'` on all occurrences (there are 6 of them).

CHANGE 6 - In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx: In the player indicator overlay (showPlayerIndicator section around line 353), replace the text `{t('seasonCardsModal.playerCoins', { coins: String(currentPlayer.coins) })}` with an inline-flex span containing <CoinIcon size={18} color='#DAA520' /> followed by the coins number. CoinIcon is already imported in SeasonCardsModal.tsx. Also in the title bar section (around line 221-223) where it shows player coins, the CoinIcon+number is already present - no change needed there.
acceptance_criteria: npx vite build completes with 0 errors
MainMenu.tsx clan tooltips show HonorIcon before honor number and CoinIcon before income number
All SPRING_CARDS, SUMMER_CARDS, AUTUMN_CARDS effect strings in game.ts are in Spanish
The CSS rule for .politics-phase-tooltip-tea::after uses left:calc(25% - 6px)
The rule-violation-toast is positioned centered within the map-container element
RegionDetailModal ClanShield drop-shadow is stronger (0.9 opacity, double shadow)
SeasonCardsModal player indicator shows CoinIcon instead of 'Monedas:' text
verification: Run `npx vite build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0
